mapper.select: select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, nullable, comments, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piitable order by db, owner, table_name, column_id
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piitable (db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, nullable, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nullable, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piitable (db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, nullable, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nullable, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piitable set column_id= #{column_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_yn= #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_position= #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, full_data_type= #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_type= #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_length= #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nullable= #{nullable, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comments= #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), upddate= SYSDATE, reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and table_name= #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and column_name= #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from ( select db, owner, table_name from cotdl.tbl_piitable
where 1=1
and upper(db) = upper(#{search4})
and upper(owner) like upper(#{search5})||'%'
and upper(table_name) like upper(#{search6})||'%'
group by db, owner, table_name ) c

select rn, owner_src, table_name_src, column_id_src, column_name_src, data_length_src, owner_arc, table_name_arc, column_id_arc, column_name_arc, data_length_arc, gapdate from ( select ROWNUM rn, owner_src, table_name_src, column_id_src, column_name_src, data_length_src, owner_arc, table_name_arc, column_id_arc, column_name_arc, data_length_arc, gapdate from ( select substr(a.owner,4,100) as owner_src, a.table_name as table_name_src, a.column_id as column_id_src, a.column_name as column_name_src, a.data_length as data_length_src, b.owner as owner_arc, b.table_name as table_name_arc, b.column_id- 5 as column_id_arc, b.column_name as column_name_arc, b.data_length as data_length_arc, SYSDATE as gapdate from ( select distinct 'PII'||b.owner as owner, b.table_name, b.column_id, b.column_name, b.data_length from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piitable b where a.exetype='ARCHIVE' and a.owner = b.owner and a.table_name = b.table_name --and a.table_name='LKDLPPAC' and ('PII'||b.owner, b.table_name, b.column_id, b.column_name, b.data_length) not in ( select distinct b.owner, b.table_name, b.column_id-5, b.column_name, b.data_length from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piitable b where a.exetype='ARCHIVE' and 'PII'||a.owner = b.owner and a.table_name = b.table_name --and a.table_name='LKDLPPAC' and b.column_name not in ('PII_ORDER_ID' ,'PII_BASE_DATE' ,'PII_CUST_ID' ,'PII_JOB_ID' ,'PII_DESTRUCT_DATE') ) ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN cotdl.tbl_piitable b ON( a.owner = b.owner and a.table_name = b.table_name and a.column_name = b.column_name) where a.table_name is null ) c where
ROWNUM <= #{pagenum} * #{amount} order by owner_src, table_name_src, column_id_src ) f where rn > (#{pagenum} -1) * #{amount} order by owner_src, table_name_src, column_id_src

select count(1) from ( select distinct 'PII'||b.owner as owner, b.table_name, b.column_id, b.column_name, b.data_length from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piitable b where a.exetype='ARCHIVE' and a.owner = b.owner and a.table_name = b.table_name --and a.table_name='LKDLPPAC' and ('PII'||b.owner, b.table_name, b.column_id, b.column_name, b.data_length) not in ( select distinct b.owner, b.table_name, b.column_id-5, b.column_name, b.data_length from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piitable b where a.exetype='ARCHIVE' and 'PII'||a.owner = b.owner and a.table_name = b.table_name --and a.table_name='LKDLPPAC' and b.column_name not in ('PII_ORDER_ID' ,'PII_BASE_DATE' ,'PII_CUST_ID' ,'PII_JOB_ID' ,'PII_DESTRUCT_DATE') ) ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN cotdl.tbl_piitable b ON( a.owner = b.owner and a.table_name = b.table_name and a.column_name = b.column_name) where a.table_name is null
